title: INDIVIDUAL EXTRACTION – Guide
author: Plazi Verein
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The presentation integrates Plazi's learning courses. The document is a tutorial step-by-step to proceed with a data extraction from a publication using the program GoldenGATE Imagine.
